case_title: SULAYMAN CHERIF VS. COSTCO WHOLESALE CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,350.00 FILED BY CHERIF, SULAYMAN AS TO DEFENDANT COSTCO WHOLESALE CORPORATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-08-2009 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHERIF, SULAYMAN AS TO DEFENDANT COSTCO WHOLESALE CORPORATION
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED NOV-06-2008, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT COSTCO WHOLESALE CORPORATION
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-08-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-08-2009 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT COSTCO WHOLESALE CORPORATION
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-08-2009 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHERIF, SULAYMAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT COSTCO WHOLESALE CORPORATION $1,305.75 PRINCIPAL, $40.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,345.75, THE COURT FINDS THAT DEFENDANT WAS THE BAILEE OF PLAINTIFF'S CAR AND RESPONISBLE FOR THE DAMAGES CAUSED WHILE THE CAR WAS IN ITS CUSTODY AND CONTROL. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT COSTCO WHOLESALE CORPORATION
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED APR-01-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED
